State of the Art: Manual expert workflow (weeks); fully manual workflow (0% autonomy)
Proposed Target: ≥10× median speedup over manual baseline; ≥70% of end-to-end workflow steps completed without human intervention

State of the Art: Keyword-matching baseline (<30% auto-alignment); expert manual validation only
Proposed Target: ≥85% auto-alignment; ≥3× over keyword-matching baseline; ≥85% of AI suggestions independently validated against ground-truth data or expert consensus
≥95% air-domain / ≥85% soil-water records pass all 6 QA checks

State of the Art: BM25 keyword search; peer-reviewed manual analysis
Proposed Target: Precision@10 ≥0.80; ≥30% improvement over BM25; ≥90% of AI outputs rated scientifically sound by ≥2 independent domain experts

State of the Art: Expert panel agreement (≥2 experts); manual expert decisions (no AI assistance)
Proposed Target: 100% outputs satisfy 5-item provenance checklist; Cohen's κ≥0.80; ≥80% of AI suggestions accepted by domain experts without modification
